name: facesymai
description: Facial symmetry analysis for stroke-warning decision support research.

scripts.lint: scripts/run_in_project_env.sh python -m ruff check src scripts tests
scripts.lint:fix: scripts/run_in_project_env.sh python -m ruff check src scripts tests --fix
scripts.lint:syntax: scripts/run_in_project_env.sh python -m compileall -q src scripts tests
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test
scripts.serve:label: scripts/run_in_project_env.sh python scripts/serve_face_asymmetry_label_tool.py
